title: The Broken Script: Lost Geometry
description: add-on for mod the broken script
body:
[WARNING: SYSTEM_INTEGRITY_COMPROMISED]
Something is crawling through the code. It’s not a human, and it’s not a mob you know. It’s a glitch given form. This is an unofficial expansion for The Broken Script.

Features:
The Hand Walker: A disturbing entity with a broken silhouette. It has two unnaturally long arms that reach the ground and two tiny, stunted legs. It moves with a frantic, swaying motion, relying on its massive hands to propel itself forward. Its presence is marked by a strange triangular symbol and a feeling of being watched.

The "Null" Greeting: Your welcome to this world is a death threat. Watch the chat—if you see <null> oh_time__to_die, the Hand Walker has already logged your location.

Corrupted Experience: No extra fluff. Just a terrifying addition to the TBS universe that focuses on psychological dread and "broken" geometry.

**[SYSTEM WARNING]: MOD STATUS: EARLY ALPHA.
Expect instability and bugs. Version 0.0.3 is currently under construction. Proceed with caution.**
[dowland geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
